subcodes.first_line: I testify to that which God Himself hath testified before the creation of earth and heaven, that there is none other God but Him, Who hath ever been sanctified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارض انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
